title: The Swedish BioFINDER 2 Study
study_type: OBSERVATIONAL-style natural history cohort (registered as INTERVENTIONAL due to PET tracer administration)
note: Registry-defined primary outcomes (clinical diagnosis, CDR-SB change) do NOT correspond to sal26's claim subject (plasma eMTBR-tau243 + %p-tau217 staging concordance with PET/tau staging) -- sal26 is a secondary/exploratory biomarker analysis nested in this parent cohort, not testing the registry's own primary endpoint. has_results=False. Endpoint concordance: not_applicable, not 'discordant' or 'pending' -- the registered primary endpoint is simply not the thing the claim is about.
